description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun with a matte black finish, featuring a cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The receiver is streamlined and includes a prominent charging handle on the left side, with a curved box magazine inserted into the magwell. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped and textured for secure handling, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver. The stock is a short, fixed polymer design with a slight curve, and the rear sight is a drum-style aperture paired with a protected front post. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external attachments and a focus on compactness and maneuverability.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a cylindrical suppressor, curved box magazine, and fixed polymer stock. Features ergonomic grip and drum-style rear sight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical suppressor and the protected front sight post.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the charging handle, curved box magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the fixed polymer stock and drum-style rear sight.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the magazine, trigger guard, and overall streamlined receiver.
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: drum-style rear aperture with protected front post
